scripts.preinstall: node -e "if(process.env.INIT_CWD&&process.env.INIT_CWD===process.cwd()){console.error('[tmuxcc] npm must run from the weave/workweave ROOT, not this subdir ('+process.cwd()+').\n[tmuxcc] From the root: npm install  |  npm run build -w '+require('./package.json').name);process.exit(1)}"
scripts.prebuild: node -e "if(process.env.INIT_CWD&&process.env.INIT_CWD===process.cwd()){console.error('[tmuxcc] npm must run from the weave/workweave ROOT, not this subdir ('+process.cwd()+').\n[tmuxcc] From the root: npm install  |  npm run build -w '+require('./package.json').name);process.exit(1)}"
scripts.test: npm run test:unit && npm run test:real-tmux
scripts.ci: npm run build && npm run typecheck && npm run test && npm run lint:boundaries
